title: Visa Launches AI and Stablecoin Tools to Power Agentic Commerce
message_html: Visa Launches AI and Stablecoin Tools to Power Agentic Commerce ...
snippet: Visa announced new artificial intelligence (AI), stablecoin and token initiatives Wednesday (June 10). While unveiling these initiatives at Visa Payments Forum 2026, the company said they are designed to help clients unlock a new generation of commerce that is fast, automated and intelligent, it sai
